Overview of PebbleOS resources, including documentation, code repository, and community links.

# Purpose
The content provides a structured overview of resources and links related to the PebbleOS project. It includes visual elements such as a logo and badges that indicate the status of the build process and documentation. The resources are categorized into sections like "Getting Started," "Code and Development," and "Community and Support," each containing relevant links. These links direct users to documentation, guides, the source code repository, issue tracker, contribution guidelines, and community platforms like Discord and GitHub Discussions. This organization helps users navigate the project resources efficiently.
